title: Tooling change-over apparatus
abstract: Tooling change-over apparatus, comprising: a change-over trolley (1) for carrying a jig, positioner (9) in a workstation, and a jig mounting base (6) provided on said change-over trolley (1) for carrying said jig.The tooling change-over apparatus further comprises two locking systems (45) symmetrically arranged in respect of the two sides of said change-over trolley (1), for locking said jig to said workstation and for providing electrical and gas connection therebetween. Each of the two locking systems (45) includes a tool locking mechanism (7), an electrical and gas interface (3) and a tool positioning mechanism (5) relative to the same side of said change-over trolley (1). The tool locking mechanism (7) locks the jig to the positioner (9) after a change-over. The electrical and gas interface provides quick electrical and gas connection between the workstation and the jig, and the positioning mechanism positions the jig during the change-over.
